name: STOA Content — Blog Publish (Google Indexing + Slack)

meta.notes:
Blog publish pipeline: receives URLs from GHA scheduled-publish workflow, submits to Google Indexing API, sends Slack notification.

Required env vars:
  - GOOGLE_INDEXING_API_KEY: Google Cloud API key with Indexing API enabled (optional — Slack still fires without it)
  - SLACK_CONTENT_WEBHOOK or SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL: Slack incoming webhook URL

Required n8n settings:
  - NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_BUILTIN=crypto,https,url,buffer
  - N8N_BLOCK_ENV_ACCESS_IN_NODE=false

Setup:
  1. Import this workflow in n8n (n8n.gostoa.dev)
  2. Set env vars in n8n
  3. Activate the workflow
  4. Copy the webhook URL to stoa-docs repo: Settings > Variables > N8N_BLOG_PUBLISH_WEBHOOK

Google Indexing API setup:
  1. Enable Indexing API in Google Cloud Console
  2. Create API key or service account
  3. Add the service account as Owner in Google Search Console (site: docs.gostoa.dev)
  4. Set GOOGLE_INDEXING_API_KEY env var in n8n
